User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the CafeQR platform. This includes Super Admins managing the platform and Cafe Admins managing specific cafes. Authentication is assumed to be handled by an external system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for login purposes.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'super_admin', 'cafe_admin').

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe this user is an administrator for. Applicable only for 'cafe_admin' roles. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N User)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Cafe.title: Cafe
Cafe.description: Represents a single cafe business, acting as a tenant within the multi-tenant CafeQR platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cafe entity.

name.description: The official business name of the cafe.

description.description: A brief description or motto of the cafe.

address.description: The primary physical address of the cafe's main location.

phone.description: The main contact phone number for the cafe.

email.description: The main contact email address for the cafe.

logoUrl.description: URL to the cafe's logo image.

status.description: The current operational status of the cafe account (e.g., 'active', 'suspended', 'pending').

subscriptionId.description: Reference to the active Subscription for this cafe. (Relationship: Cafe 1:1 Subscription)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cafe account was registered.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cafe account details were last updated.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Defines the various subscription plans offered by the CafeQR platform, managed by Super Admins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plan entity.

name.description: The name of the subscription plan (e.g., 'Basic', 'Premium', 'Enterprise').

description.description: A detailed description of the features and benefits included in the plan.

price.description: The monetary cost of the plan per billing cycle.

billingCycle.description: The frequency at which the plan is billed (e.g., 'monthly', 'annually').

features.description: A list of unique feature identifiers enabled for this plan (e.g., 'loyalty_system', 'car_ordering', 'multiple_users', 'reports').

limits.description: A list of objects defining numeric limits imposed by the plan (e.g., max branches, max tables, max products).

isActive.description: Indicates whether the plan is currently active and available for cafes to subscribe to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the plan details were last updated.

Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: Represents a specific cafe's active or past subscription to a particular Plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Subscription entity.

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe that holds this subscription. (Relationship: Cafe 1:1 Subscription)

planId.description: Reference to the Plan that this subscription is based on. (Relationship: Plan 1:N Subscription)

startDate.description: The date when this subscription period began.

endDate.description: The date when this subscription period is scheduled to end.

status.description: The current status of the subscription (e.g., 'active', 'expired', 'cancelled', 'trial').

currentUsage.description: A list of objects representing current usage metrics for the cafe against its plan limits (e.g., current number of branches, tables, products).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was last updated.

Branch.title: Branch
Branch.description: Represents a physical location or outlet of a Cafe.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Branch entity.

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe this branch belongs to. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N Branch)

name.description: The name of the branch (e.g., 'Downtown Branch', 'Mall Kiosk').

address.description: The full physical address of the branch.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the branch.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the branch, such as its storefront.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the branch record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the branch details were last updated.

Table.title: Table
Table.description: Represents a specific dining table or ordering point within a Cafe Branch, linked to a QR code.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Table entity.

branchId.description: Reference to the Branch this table is located in. (Relationship: Branch 1:N Table)

tableNumber.description: The unique identifier or number assigned to the table within its branch (e.g., 'T1', 'Bar Seat 3').

description.description: An optional description of the table's location or characteristics (e.g., 'Window seat', 'Outdoor patio table').

status.description: The current operational status of the table (e.g., 'available', 'occupied', 'needs_cleaning').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the table record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the table record was last updated.

QRCode.title: QRCode
QRCode.description: Represents a generated QR code designed to link customers to a specific Table for ordering.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QRCode entity.

tableId.description: Reference to the Table this QR code is associated with. (Relationship: Table 1:1 QRCode)

codeValue.description: The actual string value embedded within the QR code, used for system lookup upon scanning.

qrCodeImageUrl.description: URL to the generated image of the QR code, allowing for download and printing.

isActive.description: Indicates whether this QR code is currently active and can be used by customers.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the QR code record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the QR code record was last updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Used to organize menu items (Products) into logical groups for a cafe.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe this category belongs to. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N Category)

name.description: The display name of the category (e.g., 'Hot Beverages', 'Pastries', 'Sandwiches').

description.description: A brief description of the types of products found in this category.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the category.

displayOrder.description: A numeric value indicating the order in which this category should be displayed on the menu.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the category is currently active and visible on the customer menu.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual food or drink item available on a cafe's menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe this product belongs to, ensuring multi-tenant data isolation. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N Product)

name.description: The display name of the product (e.g., 'Espresso', 'Chocolate Croissant').

description.description: A detailed description of the product, potentially AI-generated for marketing appeal.

price.description: The base price of the product.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the product.

isAvailable.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for customers to order.

calories.description: The approximate caloric content of the product, if provided.

prepTimeMinutes.description: Estimated time in minutes required to prepare the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated.

ProductOption.title: ProductOption
ProductOption.description: Defines configurable options or variations for a specific Product (e.g., 'Size', 'Milk Type', 'Add-ons').

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductOption entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product this option applies to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductOption)

name.description: The display name of the option group (e.g., 'Size', 'Sweetness Level').

type.description: The selection type for this option (e.g., 'single_select', 'multi_select', 'quantity_modifier').

isRequired.description: Indicates if selecting an option from this group is mandatory for the product.

choices.description: An array of available choices within this option group, each with its own properties.

displayOrder.description: A numeric value indicating the order in which this option group should be displayed on the menu.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product option was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product option was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer primarily for loyalty tracking within a specific cafe. Customers are identified by phone number.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe this customer's loyalty profile belongs to. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N Customer)

phoneNumber.description: The customer's phone number, serving as a primary identifier for loyalty. Unique per cafe.

totalLoyaltyPoints.description: The current total loyalty points accumulated by this customer at this specific cafe.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's submitted order within a cafe, including details like items, status, and payment information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe where this order was placed. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N Order)

branchId.description: Reference to the Branch where this order was placed. (Relationship: Branch 1:N Order)

tableId.description: Reference to the Table if the order is for dine-in. (Relationship: Table 1:N Order)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer if associated with a loyalty profile. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

carNumber.description: The car number provided by the customer, if the orderType is 'car_order'.

status.description: The current processing status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'ready', 'completed', 'cancelled').

subtotalAmount.description: The sum of all order items' base prices before any taxes, discounts, or loyalty redemptions.

totalAmount.description: The final total amount of the order, including all applied options, taxes, discounts, and loyalty redemptions.

loyaltyPointsEarned.description: The number of loyalty points earned by the customer from this order.

loyaltyPointsUsed.description: The number of loyalty points redeemed by the customer for this order.

orderDateTime.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

notes.description: General notes or special instructions provided by the customer for the entire order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included within a customer's Order, along with its specific details and selected options.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product that was ordered. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

productName.description: The name of the product at the time the order was placed (for historical accuracy).

quantity.description: The quantity of this specific product item ordered.

unitPrice.description: The price of a single unit of the product (including any option adjustments) at the time of order.

subtotal.description: The total price for this individual order item (quantity * unitPrice).

notes.description: Item-specific notes or special instructions provided by the customer.

selectedOptions.description: An array detailing the selected options and their price adjustments for this product item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order item record was created.

LoyaltyPointTransaction.title: LoyaltyPointTransaction
LoyaltyPointTransaction.description: Records individual transactions that modify a customer's loyalty point balance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LoyaltyPointTransaction entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer whose loyalty points are affected. (Relationship: Customer 1:N LoyaltyPointTransaction)

cafeId.description: Reference to the Cafe where the loyalty transaction occurred. (Relationship: Cafe 1:N LoyaltyPointTransaction)

orderId.description: Reference to the Order that generated or used these loyalty points, if applicable. (Relationship: Order 1:N LoyaltyPointTransaction)

pointsChange.description: The numeric change in loyalty points. Positive for points earned, negative for points spent or redeemed.

description.description: A brief description of the loyalty transaction (e.g., 'Earned from purchase', 'Points redeemed for discount', 'Manual adjustment').

transactionDate.description: The date and time when the loyalty point transaction occurred.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the loyalty transaction record was created.

definition.description: Stores user profiles, including their role and associated cafe ID (if a Cafe Admin). The document ID matches `request.auth.uid` for direct authorization. This serves as the primary source for user authentication context for security rules.

A dedicated top-level collection for Super Admin roles. The existence of a document at `/roles_super_admin/{request.auth.uid}` indicates Super Admin privileges. This follows the 'Existence over Content' pattern for global roles.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching their `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Represents a single cafe business and acts as the root for all cafe-specific tenant data. Access is controlled by Super Admins or the associated Cafe Admin.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Cafe.

definition.description: Defines subscription plans offered by the platform. This is a global resource, managed exclusively by Super Admins.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Plan.

definition.description: Records active or past subscriptions for cafes. Managed by Super Admins, with read-only access for the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Subscription.

definition.description: Represents a physical location or outlet of a Cafe. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Cafe.

params.name: branchId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Branch.

definition.description: Represents a dining table or ordering point within a Cafe Branch. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Cafe.

params.name: branchId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Branch.

params.name: tableId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Table.

definition.description: Represents a generated QR code used to link customers to a specific Table for ordering. This is a top-level collection, with the document ID being the 'codeValue' itself, for efficient public lookup. Includes denormalized 'cafeId', 'branchId', and 'tableId' for authorization independence, especially for anonymous customer orders.

params.name: qrCodeValue
params.description: The actual string value embedded within the QR code, used as the document ID for direct lookup.

definition.description: Organizes menu items for a Cafe. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin and publicly readable. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Cafe.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Category.

definition.description: Represents an individual menu item. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin and publicly readable. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' and 'categoryId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Cafe.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Category.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Product.

definition.description: Defines configurable options for a Product. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin and publicly readable. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' and 'categoryId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the great-grandparent Cafe.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Category.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Product.

params.name: optionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the ProductOption.

definition.description: Stores customer loyalty profiles for a specific Cafe. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Cafe.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Customer.

definition.description: Represents a customer's submitted order. Writeable by anonymous customers (during order placement) and managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId', 'branchId', 'tableId', and 'customerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Cafe.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Order.

definition.description: Represents a single product item within an Order. Writeable by anonymous customers (during order creation) and managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' and 'branchId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Cafe.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the OrderItem.

definition.description: Records individual loyalty point changes for a Customer. Managed by the associated Cafe Admin. Includes denormalized 'cafeId' and 'customerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: cafeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Cafe.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Customer.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the LoyaltyPointTransaction.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for CafeQR is designed with multi-tenancy and robust access control as primary concerns, adhering strictly to Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and consistent Access Modeling. Each cafe operates as a distinct tenant, with its data isolated under a dedicated '/cafes/{cafeId}' root.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL Denormalization):**
To eliminate the need for `get()` calls in security rules, crucial ancestor IDs are denormalized into subcollection documents. Specifically:

*   **`Table` documents** (nested under `branches`) will include `cafeId` to allow rules to verify cafe admin access without fetching the parent `Branch` document.
*   **`QRCode` documents** (placed at the top-level collection `/qrcodes/{qrCodeValue}` for public lookup) will include `cafeId`, `branchId`, and `tableId`. This is critical for anonymous users to place orders, as it allows security rules to validate the `cafeId`, `branchId`, and `tableId` context directly from the QR code document without any `get()` operations on parent collections.
*   **`ProductOption` documents** (nested under `products`) will include `cafeId` and `categoryId` to ensure that cafe administrators can manage them, and customers can view them, without rules needing to fetch parent `Product` or `Category` documents.
*   **`OrderItem` documents** (nested under `orders`) will include `cafeId` and `branchId` to validate that modifications or reads are performed by the correct cafe admin or customer, bypassing parent `Order` document fetches.

This denormalization ensures that security rules are simple, atomic, and performant, as all necessary authorization context is present within the `resource.data` of the document being accessed.

**Structural Segregation and QAPs (Queryable Access Patterns):**

*   **Multi-tenancy:** All cafe-specific data is rooted under `/cafes/{cafeId}/...`, providing inherent data isolation. This naturally supports QAPs for cafe admins, allowing them to query their own branches, tables, menus, orders, and customers without leaking data from other cafes.
*   **Global Data:** `Users`, `Plans`, `Subscriptions`, and `SuperAdminRoles` are top-level collections. `Plans` and `SuperAdminRoles` are accessible only by Super Admins, while `Subscriptions` are accessible by Super Admins and read-only by relevant Cafe Admins.
*   **Public QR Code Access:** The `QRCode` entity is strategically placed as a top-level collection (`/qrcodes/{qrCodeValue}`). By using the `codeValue` as the document ID and including denormalized `cafeId`, `branchId`, and `tableId`, this enables anonymous customer users to perform a single, unauthenticated `get()` operation on `/qrcodes/{qrCodeValue}`. This `get()` retrieves the full context needed to direct the customer to the correct menu and allow them to place an order, satisfying the QAP for customer ordering without requiring complex multi-path lookups or `get()` calls in rules to establish the ordering context.
*   **Menu Visibility:** `Category`, `Product`, and `ProductOption` documents are nested under `/cafes/{cafeId}/...` and contain `isActive` or `isAvailable` flags. Rules can permit public read access to documents where these flags are true, enabling customers to easily query and view the active menu for a given cafe without exposing draft or inactive items. This fulfills QAPs for public menu display.

**DBAC and Predictability:**

*   **Roles:** User roles are managed via a `/users/{userId}` collection (containing `role` and `cafeId`) and a dedicated `/roles_super_admin/{userId}` collection (for existence checks). This allows for clear, explicit role-based authorization using `request.auth.uid` and direct data lookups within the `request.auth` context or easily accessible role documents.
*   **Consistent Naming:** Wildcards are descriptive (e.g., `{cafeId}`, `{branchId}`), and fields like `ownerId` (or `cafeId` in this context) are consistently used for authorization, enhancing debuggability and predictability of the rule set.
